title: How to Connect Any OAuth2 Service to AI Agents with Auth0 Token Vault
author: Deepu K Sasidharan
summary: Learn to connect any OAuth2 service to AI agents with Auth0 Token Vault's custom OAuth2 integration.

title: What Our Design Team Stopped Doing to Start Leading the System for Quality
author: Jourdan Nyhof
summary: A candid look at the legacy tasks our design team intentionally abandoned in order to bridge the gap between design concepts and production-ready code.

title: The Pre-Launch Identity Audit: Shipping Secure and Optimized Auth
author: Carlos Aguilar
summary: Run this pre-launch Auth0 identity audit to lock down token signing, configure log streaming, and optimize your B2B vs B2C apps.

title: How to Sign Up and Log In with Passkeys on iOS Using Auth0's Native Login
summary: Learn how to implement passkey signup, login, and logout in an iOS app using Auth0's Native Login and the Auth0.swift SDK.

title: The Many Faces of OAuth 2.0 Token Exchange
author: Andrea Chiarelli
summary: A journey through the various facets of token exchange: from use cases to management complexity

title: Back-Channel Logout with TanStack Start
author: Rudy Dahbura
summary: Learn how to secure your distributed session states by implementing Auth0 Back-Channel Logout using TanStack Start server routes

title: Why AI Agents Need Their Own Permission Model
author: Cameron Pavey
summary: Learn why traditional OAuth and API keys fail for autonomous systems and how to build a secure, least-privilege AI architecture using Fine-Grained Authorization.

title: Enterprise Trust Is a Race. Here is How to Win It
author: Sheena Allan
summary: Win the enterprise identity security race. Master the Trust Stack to deliver frictionless onboarding, automated SCIM, and real-time threat remediation.

title: Securing AI Agents in Healthcare and Life Sciences
summary: Secure AI agents in healthcare and life sciences using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and Auth0 for AI Agents to prevent data leakage and manage over-privileged access.

title: Do Not Let Your AI Go Rogue, Guard Against Agentic Misalignment
author: Manish Hatwalne
summary: Learn how to prevent agentic misalignment in autonomous AI agents using OpenFGA, Model Context Protocol, and practical human-in-the-loop guardrails.

title: You Are in Control: Auth0 Enterprise Is Now Self-Service
author: Alisha Tingle
summary: Learn how to upgrade your Auth0 subscription to B2B or B2C Enterprise tiers instantly using the new self-service dashboard options.

title: Token Vault with Organizations Support Is Generally Available
author: Ashish Lal
summary: Token Vault now supports Auth0 Organizations, isolating user credentials within strict multi-tenant boundaries.

title: Implementing the Device Authorization Flow in a C# Console App
author: Andrea Chiarelli
summary: Learn how to implement the OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization flow to authorize a .NET console application built with C\#.

title: Accelerating Developer Velocity: Announcing Auth0's Native Integration with Vercel
author: Gareth Davies
summary: Add production-ready authentication to your Vercel app in a few clicks.

title: AI Agents Are Not Users: Building an Identity Model That Reflects That
author: Cameron Pavey
summary: Forcing autonomous software into human user profiles creates massive security risks. Discover how to build a first-class AI agent identity architecture.

title: The Part of Software Engineering AI Cannot Replace
author: Carla Urrea Stabile
summary: AI replaced the code-writing part of software engineering, but it did not replace the engineering itself. This post explores what is left when code generation is instant. Judgment, system thinking, and the ability to audit what you did not write.

title: LLMjacking and the Hidden Cost of a Stolen API Key
author: Thinus Swart
summary: Learn how LLMjacking targets your AI stack, the hidden financial costs of stolen API keys, and actionable strategies to safeguard your models.

title: Passkey Adoption Is Rising, but Is It Worth It Yet?
author: Thinus Swart
summary: Discover the strategic trade-offs of enterprise passkey deployment. Learn the differences between synced and device-bound credentials under FIDO2 standards.

title: Does Your Agent Want to See Other People? Identity-Chained Authorization with Auth0 Token Vault.
author: Atib Jawad Zion
summary: The Grand prize winner of Auth0's Authorized to Act hackathon, Department of Incidents, talks about identity-chained authorization using Auth0 Token Vault to secure AI agents.

title: Embedded Login Advancements: Put Your Apps in Control of Identity to Accelerate Conversions
author: Samantha Murphy
summary: Build identity flows where users convert—integrated with checkout, within agents, inline in-app.
